violations.finding: Hardcoded absolute path '/root/.claude/hooks' inserted into sys.path. This breaks portability on any system where the hooks directory is not at /root/.claude/hooks.
violations.recommendation: Derive the hooks path from an environment variable or the script's own location: e.g., HOOKS_DIR = Path(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_HOOKS_DIR', Path(__file__).parent.parent / 'hooks')); sys.path.insert(0, str(HOOKS_DIR))

violations.finding: Hardcoded fallback path '/root/docs/dev/overnight' used as a candidate base directory. Breaks portability on any system where the project root is not /root.
violations.recommendation: Remove the hardcoded /root fallback or derive it from CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR: e.g., Path(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR', os.getcwd())) / 'docs' / 'dev' / 'overnight'

violations.finding: Hardcoded fallback path '/root' used when CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR and os.getcwd() both fail. Any environment where the project is not under /root will silently use an incorrect project_dir.
violations.recommendation: Remove the '/root' fallback; fail explicitly instead: project_dir = os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR') or os.getcwd() — if neither is available, exit with an error rather than silently defaulting to a hardcoded path.
